title: Classic Bluebird House Plan with Dimensions
description: Step-by-step cedar bluebird house plan with exact dimensions. 1.5-inch entry hole, slanted roof for rain runoff, and cleanout door on the back. #birdhouse #bluebird #woodworking
alt_text: Dimensioned plan drawing of a cedar bluebird house with labeled parts

title: Cedar Birdhouse Build From Start to Finish
description: Full photo walkthrough of a cedar bluebird box build. Shows table saw ripping, assembly, and exterior finish. #birdhouse #cedar #DIYwoodworking
alt_text: Series of photos showing a cedar birdhouse build process from rough lumber to finished box

title: Chickadee Birdhouse Dimensions and Entry Hole Guide
description: Proper dimensions for a Carolina Chickadee house. Entry hole 1.125 inches, floor 4x4, depth 8 to 10 inches. Natural cedar or pine with no paint inside. #chickadee #birdhouse
alt_text: Diagram of a chickadee birdhouse with measurements labeled

title: How to Mount a Birdhouse on a Post - No Trees Needed
description: Using a 4x4 post and a metal predator baffle to mount birdhouses in open yards. Best placement for bluebirds in the South. #birdhouse #mounting #bluebird
alt_text: A mounted bluebird box on a wooden post with a metal predator guard baffle

title: Purple Martin Multi-Unit House Plans
description: Plans for a 12-room purple martin house on a telescoping pole. Full dimensions in PDF. Great for Gulf Coast backyards. #purplemartin #birdhouse #woodworking
alt_text: White painted wooden purple martin apartment house on a tall pole in a grassy yard

title: Floating Pine Shelf Build - Beginner Friendly
description: Simple floating wall shelf from pine 1x8. Uses a French cleat for solid mounting. No fancy joinery needed. #pineshelf #floatingshelf #woodworking
alt_text: Three pine floating shelves on a white wall with books and small wooden boxes displayed

title: Garage Workshop Wall Storage Shelf System
description: Heavy-duty pine shelf system for a garage shop. Holds tools, lumber offcuts, and finishing supplies. French cleat wall. #workshopstorage #garageshelf #woodworking
alt_text: Workshop wall covered in French cleat shelves and tool holders made from pine

title: Oak Keepsake Box with Rabbet Lid
description: Small oak keepsake box with a fitted rabbet lid and hand-cut finger joints. Great gift project in about a weekend. #oakbox #woodworking #joinery
alt_text: Small oak box with finger joints and a fitted lid sitting on a workbench

title: Cedar Trinket Box - Simple Weekend Project
description: A beginner-friendly cedar trinket box with a routed edge profile and simple butt joints. Aromatic cedar smells great as a keepsake box. #cedarbox #beginnerproject
alt_text: Small aromatic cedar trinket box with routed top edge and natural finish

title: Table Saw Cross-Cut Sled Plans
description: Build a reliable cross-cut sled for your table saw. Hardboard runners, squared fence, and toggle clamps. Safer and more accurate than a miter gauge. #tablesaw #sled #jig
alt_text: Homemade table saw crosscut sled with plywood base and hardwood fence on a contractor table saw

title: Box Joint Jig for the Table Saw
description: Step by step plans to build an adjustable box joint jig for your table saw. Works with a dado stack and produces tight fitting finger joints. #boxjoint #tablesaw #jig
alt_text: A shop-made box joint jig clamped to a table saw fence with oak test pieces

title: Band Saw Resawing Technique for Thick Oak
description: How to resaw thick oak slabs on a 14-inch band saw. Blade selection, fence setup, and feed rate tips for clean consistent cuts. #bandsaw #resaw #oak
alt_text: Hands guiding a thick oak board through a band saw to resaw a thin veneer slice

title: Authentic Louisiana Chicken and Sausage Gumbo
description: A true Louisiana gumbo with a dark roux, andouille sausage, chicken thighs, and the holy trinity. Served over white rice. #gumbo #louisiana #southerncooking
alt_text: A deep cast iron pot of dark roux chicken and andouille gumbo with a ladle

title: How to Make a Perfect Dark Roux
description: Step-by-step guide to cooking a chocolate roux for gumbo. Ratio of fat to flour, timing, and how to avoid burning it. The foundation of Louisiana cooking. #roux #gumbo #cajuncooking
alt_text: A wooden spoon stirring a dark chocolate roux in a cast iron skillet

title: Gulf Coast Seafood Gumbo with Shrimp and Crab
description: Mississippi Gulf Coast style seafood gumbo with Gulf shrimp, blue crab, and okra. Light roux and file powder finish. #seafoodgumbo #gulfcoast #mississippi
alt_text: Bowl of Gulf seafood gumbo with whole shrimp and crab pieces over rice

title: Okra Gumbo - Old School Southern Recipe
description: Classic Southern okra gumbo thickened naturally with okra instead of file. Uses fresh garden okra picked small for best texture. #okragumbo #southerncooking
alt_text: Bowl of thick okra gumbo over white rice with cornbread on the side

title: Southern Cast Iron Skillet Cornbread
description: Old-fashioned buttermilk cornbread baked in a cast iron skillet. Crispy crust, tender inside. The perfect side for gumbo or red beans. #cornbread #southernrecipes #castiron
alt_text: Golden cornbread in a cast iron skillet sliced into wedges

title: DIY Cedar Raised Garden Bed - 4x8 Plans
description: Simple 4x8 cedar raised bed build using 2x6 boards. No tools beyond a drill and saw. Holds soil 12 inches deep for tomatoes, peppers, and okra. #raisedbed #gardenDIY
alt_text: Freshly built cedar 4x8 raised garden bed filled with dark soil in a sunny backyard

title: Best Tomato Varieties for Hot Southern Summers
description: Heat-tolerant tomato varieties that perform in zones 8 and 9. Includes Heatmaster, Celebrity, and Sun Gold. Tips for growing in raised beds in Mississippi and Louisiana. #tomatoes #southerngarden
alt_text: Several varieties of ripe red and yellow tomatoes on the vine in a raised bed garden

title: Growing Okra in Raised Beds - Southern Garden Guide
description: How to grow okra from seed in raised beds. Spacing, watering, and harvesting tips. Pick at 3 to 4 inches for tenderness. Great for gumbo. #okra #raisedbed #southerngarden
alt_text: Tall okra plants in a raised bed garden with bright yellow flowers and small pods

title: Hot Pepper Growing Guide for the Deep South
description: Tips for growing cayenne, poblano, and Jimmy Nardello peppers in zone 8b raised beds. Fertilizing, watering, and when to harvest. #peppers #raisedbed #southerngarden
alt_text: Raised bed garden row with green and red cayenne pepper plants in full sun

title: Predator Guard Baffle for Birdhouse Posts
description: How to install a metal cone predator baffle on a wooden post to protect nesting birds from cats and raccoons. Essential for bluebird boxes. #birdhouse #predatorguard
alt_text: A metal cone predator baffle wrapped around a 4x4 post below a wooden birdhouse
